data.title: A Two-part, Two-cohort, Double-blind, Randomized, Placebo-controlled, Multicenter Phase 1/2 Study to Evaluate the Safety, Tolerability and Efficacy of REJUVEINIX (RJX) in Patients With COVID-19
data.brief_summary: This study is designed as a 2-part, 2-cohort, double-blind, randomized, placebo controlled, multicenter Phase 1/2 study to evaluate the safety, tolerability and efficacy of RJX in patients with COVID-19.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria

Cohort 1 (Part 1 and Part 2):

1. Hospitalized COVID-19 patients ≥18 years without hypoxemia who are either not receiving any oxygen therapy OR are receiving supplemental oxygen via mask or nasal prongs (namely, clinical status score 4 or 5 on an 8-point ordinal scale)
2. Hospita
endpoints: Safety as measured by DLTs and drug related SAE's
Tolerability and Efficacy measured by progression of disease through an ordinal scale.
Efficacy measured by time to resolution of respiratory failure
